hero.headline:
Crystal Clear Pools, Zero
Worry
hero.subheadline: Your pool should be your favorite place to unwind, not another weekend chore. Bluewater Pro's CPO-certified technicians handle every detail so you can skip the chemicals and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Professional Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Start to Finish
services.subtitle: Whether it's a weekly cleaning or a full equipment overhaul, our CPO-certified team keeps your pool pristine so you can enjoy every swim.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and filter cleaning to keep your pool sparkling and swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance Plans
cards.description: Ongoing chemical balancing, water quality management, and equipment checks to keep your pool in peak condition all year round.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems diagnosed and fixed fast by certified technicians. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, crystal clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation, just clean water.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Management
cards.description: Full-service pool care for hotels, apartments, and public facilities. Compliance monitoring, water quality management, and regular maintenance.

cards.title: One-Time Deep Clean
cards.description: Pool looking rough after a storm or long break? We'll restore it to crystal clear in 48-72 hours with our deep-clean recovery service.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Request Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule and handle cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and anything else your pool needs.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, balanced, and swim-ready every day. If you're ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right at no charge.

about.label: Why San Antonio Trusts Bluewater
about.headline: CPO-Certified Pros Who Treat Your Pool Like Their Own
about.description: Bluewater Pro Pool Service has been serving San Antonio and Austin since 2020 with one mission: make pool ownership easy. Our CPO-certified technicians are members of the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance, and we carry a BBB A rating because we believe in earning your trust every visit.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician holds a Certified Pool Operator credential and is trained to professional industry standards.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises whatsoever.

features.title: BBB Accredited, A Rating
features.description: We're proud to hold a BBB A rating. Our commitment to honest service and customer satisfaction is verified.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll come back and redo it completely free. No questions, no hassle, no fine print. Your pool deserves to look perfect, and we stand behind every visit until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in San Antonio and Austin are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like green pools, we offer priority scheduling. Just call us at 210-245-7665 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're away. You'll receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: All of our technicians are CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator) and we are proud members of the Pool & Hot Tub Alliance. We also maintain a BBB A rating and carry full liability insurance for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We manage pools for hotels, apartment communities, and public facilities across San Antonio and Austin. Commercial clients receive dedicated service plans, compliance monitoring, and flexible scheduling.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel my service plan?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties, no hassle. We believe in earning your business every single visit, and you're free to leave whenever you want.

testimonials.name: Veronica MD
testimonials.text: Excellent service with a team of professionals that always go above and beyond. My pool has never looked better and I never have to worry about a thing.

testimonials.name: Robby Patel
testimonials.text: Their professionalism and expertise in pool maintenance are truly commendable. Reliable, thorough, and always on time. Highly recommend Bluewater Pro.

testimonials.name: Megan O'Rourke
testimonials.text: Professional, reliable, and thorough. My pool has never looked better! I love that I don't have to think about pool care anymore — they handle everything.
